fand

Apple Silicon fan control daemon — temperature-driven curves with hysteresis, slew limiting, and panic override, deployed as a nix-darwin LaunchDaemon.

rust 1.84aarch64-darwinSLSA L2 signedMIT
github.com/yolo-labz/fand
pattern
temperature-to-RPM curves with EMA smoothing and hysteresis
trade-off
exact-pin reproducible build vs. cargo flexibility on safety-critical SMC writes
guardrails
single-instance flock · panic-temp override · slew limit · binary F0md decision
supply chain
SLSA L2 · Sigstore · dual SBOM (CycloneDX 1.7 + SPDX 2.3) · cargo-vet
